The '''Hypertron 2000''' was a model of [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] that was manufactured by [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil]] for use in [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
